commands.review_summary:
The PR caps embedded-agent compaction reserve and keep-recent budgets when a resolved context window is known, centralizes the summary-overhead constant, and updates config docs, types, generated baseline hashes, and tests.

PR surface: Source +33, Tests +38, Docs +14, Generated 0. Total +85 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main can leave reserveTokens equal to a 16K context window because only the floor is capped, while the PR tests that the resolved reserve becomes 8,384 and keep-recent becomes 4,000. I did not run runtime tests in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Manual review should own the protected maintainer PR, compatibility acceptance, and refreshed broad proof; there is no narrow automated repair left from this review.

target.title: fix(agents): cap compaction budgets for small contexts
target.body:
## Summary

- cap embedded-agent compaction reserve when the known model context window would otherwise leave no usable prompt budget
- cap keep-recent tokens to the prompt budget remaining after reserve while preserving explicit summary overhead
- centralize the compaction summary overhead constant and update config help/types, generated config baseline hash, gateway config docs, and session-management reference docs to document context-window caps

## Verification

Behavior addressed: small-context runs no longer retain impossible compaction `reserveTokens` or `keepRecentTokens` budgets when `contextTokenBudget` is known, and compacted tails no longer consume the whole post-reserve prompt budget before the summary is added.

Real environment tested: focused local Vitest/docs/format/lint proof in a Codex worktree; remote Crabbox/Testbox proof was attempted on the refreshed head and blocked by runner availability/auth, noted below.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```sh
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/agent-settings.test.ts --reporter=dot
node --import tsx scripts/generate-config-doc-baseline.ts --write
node --import tsx scripts/generate-config-doc-baseline.ts --check
node scripts/check-docs-mdx.mjs docs/reference/session-management-compaction.md docs/gateway/config-agents.md
node scripts/format-docs.mjs --check docs/reference/session-management-compaction.md docs/gateway/config-agents.md
node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/agent-settings.ts src/agents/agent-settings.test.ts src/agents/agent-compaction-constants.ts src/agents/compaction-planning.ts src/config/schema.help.ts src/config/types.agent-defaults.ts
node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/agents/agent-settings.ts src/agents/agent-settings.test.ts src/agents/agent-compaction-constants.ts src/agents/compaction-planning.ts src/config/schema.help.ts src/config/types.agent-defaults.ts
git diff --check origin/main...HEAD
blacksmith testbox list
node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider azure --target linux --idle-timeout 90m --ttl 180m --timing-json --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"
crabbox stop --provider azure --target linux --id cbx_b8cfba03c38e
```

Evidence after fix: refreshed head `6d460a45848` is rebased onto current `origin/main` `5ee3e5d8c07`. Focused local wrapper passed `src/agents/agent-settings.test.ts` with 36/36 tests. Config baseline generation/check passed with `OK docs/.generated/config-baseline.sha256`; docs MDX passed for `docs/reference/session-management-compaction.md` and `docs/gateway/config-agents.md`; docs formatting reported `Docs formatting clean`; oxfmt, oxlint, and `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD` passed.

Remote proof: Blacksmith Testbox is blocked locally by `not authenticated - run 'blacksmith auth login' first`. Azure Crabbox allocated run `run_23b37df84fc5` with provider `azure`, lease id `cbx_b8cfba03c38e`, slug `swift-prawn`, target `linux`, but timed out after 10m waiting for a coordinator lease before running `pnpm check:changed`. Cleanup stop returned coordinator `404 not_found`, so no late active lease remained to release.

Observed result after fix: a 16K-context profile resolves reserve to `8,384` and keep-recent to `4,000`; configured over-budget reserve and keep-recent values are capped to the available context window while leaving summary overhead; when no context window is known, existing uncapped behavior is preserved. The session-management reference now documents those context-window caps and points at `applyAgentCompactionSettingsFromConfig()`, not the old uncapped helper.

What was not tested: broad remote `pnpm check:changed` on the refreshed head, because Testbox auth and Azure allocation blocked it; no live Ollama generation for this patch because the changed behavior is the embedded-agent settings normalization layer.
